name: Point of Care Nano-Technology, Inc.
summary: Point of Care Nano-Technology, Inc. focuses on developing and manufacturing saliva-based medical diagnosis products in the United States. Point of Care Nano-Technology, Inc. has a license agreement with Lamina Equities Corporation to diagnose illness in humans via a saliva test. The company was formerly known as Unique Growing Solutions, Inc. and changed its name to Point of Care Nano-Technology, Inc. in April 2015. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
